-- This script was generated by the ERD tool in pgAdmin 4.
-- Please log an issue at https://github.com/pgadmin-org/pgadmin4/issues/new/choose if you find any bugs, including reproduction steps.
BEGIN;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public."User"
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    email text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    password text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    otp text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    otp_expires timestamp without time zone,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT "User_pkey" PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT "User_email_key" UNIQUE (email)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.active_company
(
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT active_company_pkey PRIMARY KEY (admin_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.ageing
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    ledger_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    period text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    amount numeric,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    admin_id integer,
    CONSTRAINT ageing_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.agent_devices
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    device_id text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    is_active boolean DEFAULT true,
    last_seen timestamp without time zone,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT agent_devices_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT agent_devices_device_id_key UNIQUE (device_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.agent_status
(
    id integer NOT NULL GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY ( INCREMENT 1 START 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 2147483647 CACHE 1 ),
    last_sync_at timestamp without time zone,
    admin_id integer,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    sync_in_progress boolean DEFAULT false,
    CONSTRAINT agent_status_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_agent_status_admin_company UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.audit_logs
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    action text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    payload jsonb,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT audit_logs_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.bills
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    bill_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    ledger_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    bill_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    bill_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    amount numeric,
    due_date date,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    admin_id integer,
    ledger_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    bill_date date,
    bill_amount numeric DEFAULT 0,
    pending_amount numeric DEFAULT 0,
    status text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT 'Pending'::text,
    CONSTRAINT bills_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT bills_unique_bill UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid, ledger_name, bill_name),
    CONSTRAINT uq_bills_admin_company_bill_composite UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid, bill_guid, bill_name)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.companies
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    tally_username text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    tally_password text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    is_authenticated boolean DEFAULT false,
    is_protected boolean DEFAULT false,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT companies_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_companies_admin_company UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.deleted_records
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    admin_id integer,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    entity_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    entity_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    entity_data jsonb,
    deleted_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    deleted_from text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT deleted_records_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.inventory_movements
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    item_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    qty numeric NOT NULL,
    movement_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    voucher_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    voucher_date date,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT inventory_movements_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.invoice_items
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    invoice_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    item_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    quantity numeric,
    rate numeric,
    amount numeric,
    admin_id integer,
    CONSTRAINT invoice_items_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_invoice_items_admin_invoice_item UNIQUE (admin_id, invoice_guid, item_name)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.invoices
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    invoice_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    invoice_no text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    invoice_date date,
    invoice_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    party_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    total_amount numeric,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    company_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT invoices_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT invoices_invoice_guid_company_guid_unique UNIQUE (invoice_guid, company_guid),
    CONSTRAINT uq_invoices_admin_company_guid UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid, invoice_guid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.ledgers
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    ledger_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    parent_group text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    closing_balance numeric,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    opening_balance numeric DEFAULT 0,
    type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    company_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    owner_user_id integer,
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    phone character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    email character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    gstin character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    pan character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    category text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT ledgers_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT ledgers_company_ledger_unique UNIQUE (company_guid, ledger_guid),
    CONSTRAINT unique_ledger_per_admin_company UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid, ledger_guid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.license_devices
(
    id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    license_id uuid NOT NULL,
    device_fingerprint text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    activated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    last_seen timestamp without time zone,
    CONSTRAINT license_devices_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT license_devices_license_id_device_fingerprint_key UNIQUE (license_id, device_fingerprint)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.licensed_devices
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    license_id uuid,
    device_fingerprint text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    first_seen timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    last_seen timestamp without time zone,
    is_active boolean DEFAULT true,
    CONSTRAINT licensed_devices_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT licensed_devices_device_fingerprint_key UNIQUE (device_fingerprint)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.licenses
(
    id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    license_key text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    max_devices integer DEFAULT 1,
    is_active boolean DEFAULT true,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    expires_at timestamp without time zone,
    CONSTRAINT licenses_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT licenses_license_key_key UNIQUE (license_key)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.monthly_report_settings
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    admin_id integer,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    report_day integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    report_time character varying(5) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT '09:00'::character varying,
    is_active boolean DEFAULT true,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    user_id integer NOT NULL,
    enabled boolean DEFAULT true,
    day_of_month integer,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT monthly_report_settings_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_monthly_report UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid),
    CONSTRAINT uq_monthly_report_user UNIQUE (user_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.notifications
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    type character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    message text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    user_id integer,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    is_read boolean DEFAULT false,
    meta jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    CONSTRAINT notifications_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.orders
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    order_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    order_no text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    order_date date,
    party_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    order_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    amount numeric,
    due_date date,
    status text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    admin_id integer,
    is_active boolean DEFAULT true,
    CONSTRAINT orders_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT orders_order_guid_key UNIQUE (order_guid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.password_reset_requests
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    user_id integer,
    token text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    expires_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
    approved boolean DEFAULT false,
    approved_at timestamp without time zone,
    CONSTRAINT password_reset_requests_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT password_reset_requests_token_key UNIQUE (token)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.permissions
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    code character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    description text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT permissions_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT permissions_code_key UNIQUE (code)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.registration_otps
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    name character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    email character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    password character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    otp character varying(6) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    expires_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT registration_otps_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.role_permissions
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    role text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    resource text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    can_view boolean DEFAULT false,
    allowed_fields text[] COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT role_permissions_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.sales_order_items
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    order_guid uuid,
    stock_item text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    quantity numeric,
    rate numeric,
    amount numeric,
    admin_id integer,
    CONSTRAINT sales_order_items_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.sales_orders
(
    order_guid character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    company_guid character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    order_no text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    order_date date,
    party_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    order_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    total_amount numeric,
    status text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT 'Open'::text,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    due_date date,
    voucher_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT sales_orders_pkey PRIMARY KEY (admin_id, order_guid),
    CONSTRAINT uq_sales_orders_guid UNIQUE (order_guid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.selected_companies
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    selected_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT selected_companies_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT selected_companies_admin_id_company_guid_key UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.stock_balances
(
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    stock_item text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    godown text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    quantity numeric,
    value numeric,
    admin_id integer,
    CONSTRAINT stock_balances_pkey PRIMARY KEY (company_guid, stock_item, godown)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.stock_items
(
    item_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    parent_group text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    unit text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    opening_qty numeric,
    opening_value numeric,
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT pk_stock_items_admin_company PRIMARY KEY (admin_id, company_guid, item_guid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.stock_summary
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    item_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    closing_qty numeric DEFAULT 0,
    closing_value numeric DEFAULT 0,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT stock_summary_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT uniq_stock_summary UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid, item_name)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.sync_controller
(
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    is_active boolean DEFAULT false,
    last_login timestamp without time zone,
    last_logout timestamp without time zone,
    CONSTRAINT sync_controller_pkey PRIMARY KEY (admin_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.sync_logs
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    entity_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    entity_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    message text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    level text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT 'info'::text,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    queue_id integer,
    action text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    status text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    payload_hash text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    diff jsonb,
    admin_id integer,
    CONSTRAINT sync_logs_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.sync_queue
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    entity_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    entity_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    action text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    payload jsonb,
    status text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT 'pending'::text,
    error text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    processed_at timestamp without time zone,
    operation character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UPSERT'::character varying,
    source character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT 'TALLY'::character varying,
    payload_hash text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    admin_id integer,
    CONSTRAINT sync_queue_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_sync_queue_entity UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid, entity_type, entity_guid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.sync_state
(
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    last_alterid bigint DEFAULT 0,
    CONSTRAINT sync_state_pkey PRIMARY KEY (company_guid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.tally_sync_state
(
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    entity_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    last_alterid bigint,
    last_sync_at timestamp without time zone,
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT pk_tally_sync_state_admin PRIMARY KEY (admin_id, company_guid, entity_type)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_inventory_permissions
(
    user_id integer NOT NULL,
    item_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    columns jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT uq_user_inventory_admin UNIQUE (admin_id, user_id, item_name)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_ledger_permissions
(
    ledger_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    user_id integer NOT NULL,
    ledger_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default"
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_orders
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    user_id uuid NOT NULL,
    order_guid uuid NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT user_orders_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_permissions
(
    user_id integer NOT NULL,
    permission_id integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT user_permissions_pkey PRIMARY KEY (user_id, permission_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_requests
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    user_id integer NOT NULL,
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    message text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    is_read boolean DEFAULT false,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT user_requests_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.users
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    username character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    email character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    password character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    isadmin boolean DEFAULT false,
    role character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    ledger_permissions jsonb,
    vouchers_permissions jsonb DEFAULT '{"columns": {}}'::jsonb,
    orders_permissions jsonb DEFAULT '{"columns": {}, "can_view": true}'::jsonb,
    inventory_permissions jsonb DEFAULT '{"columns": {}}'::jsonb,
    dashboard_permissions jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    company character varying(150) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    notification_preferences jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    avatar_url text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    admin_id integer,
    voucher_selection_permissions jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    order_selection_permissions jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    inventory_selection_permissions jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    reset_otp character varying(6) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    otp_expiry timestamp without time zone,
    ledger_selection_permissions jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    CONSTRAINT users_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT users_email_key UNIQUE (email),
    CONSTRAINT users_username_key UNIQUE (username)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.voucher_entries
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    voucher_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    ledger_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    amount numeric,
    is_debit boolean,
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    voucher_date date,
    voucher_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    reference_no text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    is_active boolean DEFAULT true,
    admin_id integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT voucher_entries_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_voucher_entries_admin_company UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid, voucher_guid, ledger_name)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.vouchers
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    voucher_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    company_guid text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    voucher_type text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    voucher_number text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    date date,
    ledger_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    amount numeric,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    company_name text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    admin_id integer,
    net_amount numeric,
    is_deleted boolean DEFAULT false,
    is_active boolean DEFAULT true,
    voucher_date date,
    reference_no text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT vouchers_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_vouchers_admin_company UNIQUE (admin_id, company_guid, voucher_guid)
);

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.active_company
    ADD CONSTRAINT active_company_admin_fk FOREIGN KEY (admin_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS active_company_pkey
    ON public.active_company(admin_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.agent_devices
    ADD CONSTRAINT agent_devices_admin_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (admin_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.bills
    ADD CONSTRAINT bills_company_admin_fkey FOREIGN KEY (admin_id, company_guid)
    REFERENCES public.companies (admin_id, company_guid) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_bills_company_admin
    ON public.bills(admin_id, company_guid);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.companies
    ADD CONSTRAINT companies_admin_fk FOREIGN KEY (admin_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.invoices
    ADD CONSTRAINT invoices_company_admin_fkey FOREIGN KEY (admin_id, company_guid)
    REFERENCES public.companies (admin_id, company_guid) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.ledgers
    ADD CONSTRAINT ledgers_company_admin_fkey FOREIGN KEY (admin_id, company_guid)
    REFERENCES public.companies (admin_id, company_guid) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.ledgers
    ADD CONSTRAINT ledgers_owner_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (owner_user_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.license_devices
    ADD CONSTRAINT license_devices_license_fk FOREIGN KEY (license_id)
    REFERENCES public.licenses (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.licensed_devices
    ADD CONSTRAINT licensed_devices_license_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (license_id)
    REFERENCES public.licenses (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.licenses
    ADD CONSTRAINT licenses_admin_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (admin_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.monthly_report_settings
    ADD CONSTRAINT monthly_report_user_fk FOREIGN KEY (user_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_monthly_report_user
    ON public.monthly_report_settings(user_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.password_reset_requests
    ADD CONSTRAINT password_reset_requests_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.selected_companies
    ADD CONSTRAINT selected_companies_admin_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (admin_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.stock_items
    ADD CONSTRAINT stock_items_company_admin_fkey FOREIGN KEY (admin_id, company_guid)
    REFERENCES public.companies (admin_id, company_guid) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.sync_controller
    ADD CONSTRAINT sync_controller_admin_fk FOREIGN KEY (admin_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS sync_controller_pkey
    ON public.sync_controller(admin_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.sync_logs
    ADD CONSTRAINT sync_logs_queue_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (queue_id)
    REFERENCES public.sync_queue (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sync_logs_queue_id
    ON public.sync_logs(queue_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tally_sync_state
    ADD CONSTRAINT tally_sync_state_company_admin_fkey FOREIGN KEY (admin_id, company_guid)
    REFERENCES public.companies (admin_id, company_guid) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.user_inventory_permissions
    ADD CONSTRAINT user_inventory_permissions_admin_fk FOREIGN KEY (admin_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.user_inventory_permissions
    ADD CONSTRAINT user_inventory_permissions_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.user_ledger_permissions
    ADD CONSTRAINT user_ledger_permissions_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_user_ledger_permissions_user
    ON public.user_ledger_permissions(user_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.user_permissions
    ADD CONSTRAINT user_permissions_permission_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (permission_id)
    REFERENCES public.permissions (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.user_requests
    ADD CONSTRAINT user_requests_admin_fk FOREIGN KEY (admin_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.user_requests
    ADD CONSTRAINT user_requests_user_fk FOREIGN KEY (user_id)
    REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.vouchers
    ADD CONSTRAINT vouchers_company_admin_fkey FOREIGN KEY (admin_id, company_guid)
    REFERENCES public.companies (admin_id, company_guid) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE CASCADE;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_vouchers_company_admin
    ON public.vouchers(admin_id, company_guid);

END;
